x-enumeration-literals.name: DirectDebitConfirmedElectronicMandate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit instruction authorized under a confirmed electronic mandate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DirectDebitPaperMandateWithPaperAuthorization
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit instruction authorized under a paper based mandate, supported by paper authorization signed by the debtor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DirectDebitUnconfirmedElectronicMandate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit instruction authorized under an unconfirmed electronic mandate requiring confirmation by the debtor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BatchPaymentsAruba
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to an Instant Credit Transfer under the rules of the Centrale Bank van Aruba, based on the EPC SCT Inst scheme, with a specific batch time-out delay.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InstantPaymentsAruba
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to an Instant Credit Transfer under the rules of the Centrale Bank van Aruba, based on the EPC SCT Inst scheme.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditTransfers
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to credit transfers

x-enumeration-literals.name: NonPreauthorisedDirectDebitAT
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit that is not pre authorised (Einzugsermächtigung).

x-enumeration-literals.name: PreauthorisedDirectDebitAT
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit that is pre authorised (Abbuchungsauftrag).

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashPerPost
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Transaction is related to cash per post.
Transaction to ultimate recipient having no bank account. Primary beneficiary is a postal service provider. Funds are paid out by cash. Additional necessary information for address and delivery options need to be attached.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReturnedCreditTransfers
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to returned credit transfers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TruncatedCreditTransfers
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Transaction is related to truncated credit transfers.
Conversion of physical instrument to electonric form for transmission to the paying bank and where the original paper document does not continue in the clearing process..The original instrument rules are retained throughout the life of the instrument.
Transaction triggered by specific marked and populated paper slip.
Reconciliation reference is secured by check digits supporting secure optical recognition. All other remittance information is truncated prior transmission.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DirectDebits
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to direct debits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReturnedDirectDebits
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to returned direct debits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TruncatedChecks
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Transaction is related to truncated checks.
Conversion of physical instrument to electonric form for transmission to the paying bank and where the original paper document does not continue in the clearing process..The original instrument rules are retained throughout the life of the instrument.

x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit that is not pre authorised (Einzugsermächtigung).

x-enumeration-literals.name: PreauthorisedDirectDebitDE
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit that is pre authorised (Abbuchungsauftrag).

x-enumeration-literals.name: ImageBasedChequeCollection
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to the German Image-based Cheque Collection Procedure “Imagegestützter Scheckeinzug - ISE”

x-enumeration-literals.name: PaperlessChequeCollection
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to the German Paperless Cheque Collection procedure “Belegloser Scheckeinzug - BSE”

x-enumeration-literals.name: BusinessToBusinessDirectDebit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a business-to-business direct debit (CSB58).

x-enumeration-literals.name: BusinessToCustomerDirectDebit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a business-to-customer direct debit (CSB19).

x-enumeration-literals.name: AncillarySystemTransferInitiation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the payment is sent by an authorized third party on behalf of the participant.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BackupPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the payment was initiated manually using a GUI (Graphical User Interface).

x-enumeration-literals.name: MandatedPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the payment is sent by responsible Central Bank on behalf of the participant in case of contingency.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SettlementBankTransferInitiation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the payment is submitted to move  liquidity to the technical account - dedicated to real-time settlement in an external system (for example ancillary system) . The payment is processed in a separate payment queue besides the normal processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PreauthorisedDirectDebitAccéléréAcceleratedClearing2DayOrdinaireNormalClearing4Day
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to an urgent direct debit that is pre authorised (Avis de Prélèvement accéléré).

x-enumeration-literals.name: PreauthorisedDirectDebitOrdinaireNormalClearing4Day
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to a direct debit that is pre authorised (Avis de Prélèvement).

x-enumeration-literals.name: PreauthorisedDirectDebitVérifiéVerifiedClearing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to an urgent direct debit that is pre authorised (Avis de Prélèvement vérifié).

x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction is related to an urgent direct debit that is pre authorised and revocable (RID Veloce).
